records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've cleared the C.O.s in this area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've cleared the C.O.s in this area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've cleared the C.O.s in this area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that's left is the Category 3 that's causing the damage to the dimension surface!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that's left is the Category 3 that's causing the damage to the dimension surface!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that's left is the Category 3 that's causing the damage to the dimension surface!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Assault team, forward! Suppress it with firepower!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Assault team, forward! Suppress it with firepower!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Assault team, forward! Suppress it with firepower!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, wait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, wait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you stay put for a minute?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you stay put for a minute?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you stay put for a minute?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm going to borrow your shoulder for a second.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm going to borrow your shoulder for a second.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm going to borrow your shoulder for a second.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hup...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hup...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hup...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For large C.O.s like a Category 3, instead of bombarding it with firepower straight on...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For large C.O.s like a Category 3, instead of bombarding it with firepower straight on...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For large C.O.s like a Category 3, instead of bombarding it with firepower straight on...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's faster to shoot its core by aiming between its armor!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's faster to shoot its core by aiming between its armor!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's faster to shoot its core by aiming between its armor!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You killed a Category 3... with just one shot...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You killed a Category 3... with just one shot...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You killed a Category 3... with just one shot...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I froze it from the inside, so its core should've stopped functioning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I froze it from the inside, so its core should've stopped functioning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I froze it from the inside, so its core should've stopped functioning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's amazing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's amazing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's amazing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Administration Deputy Commander sure is different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Administration Deputy Commander sure is different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Administration Deputy Commander sure is different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, but my comrades in the forefront can all easily handle it too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, but my comrades in the forefront can all easily handle it too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, but my comrades in the forefront can all easily handle it too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm actually a little embarrassed you praised me for this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm actually a little embarrassed you praised me for this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm actually a little embarrassed you praised me for this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, could you check the CSE Level?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, could you check the CSE Level?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, could you check the CSE Level?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still feel like the Corruption rays haven't changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still feel like the Corruption rays haven't changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still feel like the Corruption rays haven't changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Checking the CSE Level...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Checking the CSE Level...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Checking the CSE Level...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The CSE Level still hasn't fallen down from 3!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The CSE Level still hasn't fallen down from 3!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The CSE Level still hasn't fallen down from 3!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's this possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's this possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's this possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's uncommon to see the CSE Level reach 3 in the Normalside. Maybe that's why the field agents couldn't respond in a timely manner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's uncommon to see the CSE Level reach 3 in the Normalside. Maybe that's why the field agents couldn't respond in a timely manner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's uncommon to see the CSE Level reach 3 in the Normalside. Maybe that's why the field agents couldn't respond in a timely manner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that means...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that means...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that means...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the CSE Level doesn't fall down after defeating a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the CSE Level doesn't fall down after defeating a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the CSE Level doesn't fall down after defeating a Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means that there is another one damaging the dimension surface somewhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means that there is another one damaging the dimension surface somewhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means that there is another one damaging the dimension surface somewhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To all agents on the field! There is still a Category 3 C.O. remaining in the operation zone
records.m_Talk_DEU: To all agents on the field! There is still a Category 3 C.O. remaining in the operation zone
records.m_Talk_FRA: To all agents on the field! There is still a Category 3 C.O. remaining in the operation zone

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's big, so you can't miss it. Conduct a search and track it using the Corruption ray...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's big, so you can't miss it. Conduct a search and track it using the Corruption ray...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's big, so you can't miss it. Conduct a search and track it using the Corruption ray...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>AAAAAAAGGGH...!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>AAAAAAAGGGH...!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>AAAAAAAGGGH...!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Screaming?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Screaming?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Screaming?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Where did our stray cat go? I can't find her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Where did our stray cat go? I can't find her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Where did our stray cat go? I can't find her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, if you're talking about the cat-eared agent, she started running off to somewhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, if you're talking about the cat-eared agent, she started running off to somewhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, if you're talking about the cat-eared agent, she started running off to somewhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told her she'll be safe if she sticks to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told her she'll be safe if she sticks to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told her she'll be safe if she sticks to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess this is why people say, "Curiosity killed the cat."
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess this is why people say, "Curiosity killed the cat."
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess this is why people say, "Curiosity killed the cat."

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...

records.m_Talk_ENG: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,
records.m_Talk_DEU: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,
records.m_Talk_FRA: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,

records.m_Talk_ENG: or they moved it into the building or its basement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: or they moved it into the building or its basement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: or they moved it into the building or its basement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And someone could still be in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And someone could still be in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And someone could still be in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that smell...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that smell...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that smell...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are there people still here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are there people still here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are there people still here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monster sounds...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monster sounds...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monster sounds...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crap, I must hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crap, I must hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crap, I must hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Wake up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Wake up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a firefighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a firefighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a firefighter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hurry! We're almost there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hurry! We're almost there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hurry! We're almost there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop talking and
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Stop talking and
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop talking and
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Watch out!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Watch out!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Watch out!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAAAAGGGH...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAAAAGGGH...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAAAAGGGH...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that monster?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that monster?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that monster?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this is bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this is bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this is bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This one's different from those wild dogs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This one's different from those wild dogs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This one's different from those wild dogs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-somebody, help me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-somebody, help me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-somebody, help me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't wanna die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't wanna die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't wanna die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't just run away here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't just run away here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't just run away here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krrgh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do my best to stop it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do my best to stop it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do my best to stop it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-thanks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-thanks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-thanks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come at me!! You monster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come at me!! You monster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come at me!! You monster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going down without a fight!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going down without a fight!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going down without a fight!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's late in the night, and the Administration said they confirmed that the area's been cleared...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you never know. People always come and go in construction sites.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But most of all, I'm concerned that there isn't a site office.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that the office isn't visible at the construction site...

root.m_Talk_ENG: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,
root.m_Talk_DEU: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,
root.m_Talk_FRA: means that it's in the final stages and either the office they had was demolished,

root.m_Talk_ENG: or they moved it into the building or its basement.
root.m_Talk_DEU: or they moved it into the building or its basement.
root.m_Talk_FRA: or they moved it into the building or its basement.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And someone could still be in there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And someone could still be in there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And someone could still be in there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that smell...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that smell...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that smell...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's faint, but it smells like alcohol.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are there people still here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are there people still here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are there people still here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Monster sounds...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Monster sounds...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Monster sounds...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how it's echoing, it must be in the basement!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Crap, I must hurry!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Crap, I must hurry!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Crap, I must hurry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, this place reeks of alcohol!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Wake up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Wake up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Wake up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Huh? What's all the ruckus about...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to get out of here! It's dangerous!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a firefighter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a firefighter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a firefighter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But why are you wearing cat ears? You got some odd taste, missy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah, stop your blabbering and get up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa! That sounded like something collapsing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we have to get out of here! Follow me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hurry! We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hurry! We're almost there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hurry! We're almost there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* But hey! How did you know I was down here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've dealt with plenty of guys like you when I had to respond to construction site calls!

8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Watch out!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Watch out!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Watch out!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAAAAGGGH...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAAAAGGGH...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAAAAGGGH...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is that monster?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is that monster?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is that monster?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this is bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this is bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this is bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even my axe shattered after hitting it once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This one's different from those wild dogs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This one's different from those wild dogs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This one's different from those wild dogs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can I really win against this dinosaur-looking thing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-somebody, help me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-somebody, help me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-somebody, help me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't wanna die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't wanna die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't wanna die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't just run away here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't just run away here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't just run away here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krrgh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you blocked that monster on your own...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you standing around for?! RUN! NOW!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do my best to stop it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do my best to stop it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do my best to stop it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-thanks!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-thanks!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-thanks!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just have to stop it until the bunny ears comes...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come at me!! You monster!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come at me!! You monster!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come at me!! You monster!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going down without a fight!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going down without a fight!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going down without a fight!!
